# Agentplane

site: https://agentplane.org
docs: https://agentplane.org/docs
examples: https://agentplane.org/examples
repo: https://github.com/basilisk-labs/agentplane

summary: Agentplane is an agent-agnostic harness for governed coding-agent work. It helps developers set tasks and guardrails while coding agents use the CLI, record traces, manage local context, apply reusable recipes, export artifacts, and make work reproducible and inspectable.
not: model provider, prompt playground, low-code chatbot builder, replacement for every agent framework, black-box runtime that hides operational state.
local-first: The default quickstart runs locally, writes repo-local artifacts, and does not require account creation.
cli: agentplane
license: MIT

canonical-links:
- What is Agentplane: https://agentplane.org/docs
- Quickstart: https://agentplane.org/docs/start/quickstart
- Harness engineering: https://agentplane.org/docs/concepts/harness-engineering
- Context engineering: https://agentplane.org/docs/concepts/context-engineering
- Traces: https://agentplane.org/docs/concepts/traces
- Local context: https://agentplane.org/docs/user/local-context
- Agent Change Records: https://agentplane.org/docs/reference/acr
- Examples: https://agentplane.org/examples
